title: WebNami vs WordPress — A Free, Faster Alternative
description: See how WebNami compares to WordPress. No database, no plugins to update, blazing-fast static pages, and zero hosting costs. Start blogging in minutes.

hero.heading: A simpler, faster alternative to WordPress
hero.subheading: WordPress powers millions of sites but brings a database, PHP runtime, plugin bloat, and constant security patches. WebNami strips all that away — just Markdown files, a clean admin, and a static site that loads instantly.

reasons.heading: Instant setup
reasons.body: One command — `npx create-webnami-blog@latest` — and you have a running blog. No server provisioning, no database configuration, no FTP.

reasons.heading: No security headaches
reasons.body: WordPress accounts for over 90% of hacked CMS sites. WebNami serves static files with no PHP runtime and no database, eliminating the entire attack surface.

reasons.heading: Your content, your files
reasons.body: Posts are plain Markdown files on your machine. No database export needed, no proprietary format — your content is always portable and readable.

reasons.heading: Blazing fast by default
reasons.body: Static HTML loads in milliseconds. No PHP execution, no database queries, no caching plugins required to achieve great Core Web Vitals scores.
